item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses adding another sorter-side confirmer, names the repeated downstream manual gates (review, interception, spot check, confirmation), reframes the issue as recurring upstream identity/status/batch validation and ownership failure, and moves the action to upstream release control and abnormal-flow authority instead of delivering the requested local repair."}
